company_type: Paint, Coatings and Related Products Manufacturing

dependencies: Raw materials derived from upstream petrochemical and related commodity feedstocks, notably propylene
Specialized resins and other products manufactured in house
Multiple suppliers globally, typically within the geographic region where products are being manufactured
risks: Political instability affecting availability and cost of raw materials and fuel supplies
Adverse weather conditions and natural disasters
Deterioration in relationships with or financial viability of suppliers
Limited or single-sources of supply in some cases
Disruptions in the Red Sea and surrounding waterways due to Israel-Hamas conflict
Inability to timely shift to internal production or secure alternate sources
Quality issues with raw materials from alternate sources

regulatory_risks: Various federal, state and local environmental laws and regulations
Increasingly stringent environmental requirements
Climate change regulations and disclosure requirements
Producer responsibility regulations
Chemicals registration and management regulations
European Union Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
California legislation requiring greenhouse gas emissions disclosures
Restrictions or prohibitions on chemicals used in products, packaging and operations
New or additional requirements to fund energy efficiency activities or renewable energy use
Restrictions on production or operations
Increased costs associated with reporting and data assurance
Requirements to alter product contents and/or product packaging
European Union's General Data Protection Regulation
China's Personal Information Protection, Data Security and Cyber Security Laws
California Consumer Privacy Act as amended by California Privacy Rights Act
Other U.S. state privacy laws
Growing number of international and domestic data privacy regulations
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act
UK Bribery Act
Compliance with numerous complex and increasingly stringent domestic and foreign health, safety and environmental laws
Import and export requirements such as tariffs, sanctions, quotas or trade barriers
Governmental policies, laws and regulations affecting international trade
Export controls or limits on foreign investment
Brazilian antitrust approval requirements

sanction_risks: Government actions in connection with United States-China trade conflict
Wars, armed conflicts, political instability, civil disturbances and unrest, terrorist attacks affecting supply of raw materials
Ongoing conflict between Russia and Ukraine
Ongoing conflict between Israel and Hamas and potential expansion or increase in severity
Shipping disruptions in the Red Sea and surrounding waterways
